message:
Add QuickJS UTF-8 bounds-checking patch applied at build time

- Add patches/001-quickjs-utf8-bounds-check.patch that replaces
  utf8_decode() with utf8_decode_len() in the JS parser to prevent
  buffer overreads near end of input
- Modify build.zig to apply patches from patches/ directory before
  compiling QuickJS sources
- Patches are applied with -N (don't re-apply) so builds are idempotent

This fixes "invalid UTF-8 sequence" errors when parsing large JS files
with UTF-8 content (like Claude Code bundle with Cyrillic characters).
